sql_array: CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, location GEOMETRY, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geospatial_data VALUES (1, ST_Point(1, 1), 'Point A');
INSERT INTO geospatial_data VALUES (2, ST_Point(2, 2), 'Point B');
SELECT earth_radius() AS radius, id FROM geospatial_data WHERE isIRI(description);
SELECT id, description, earth_radius() AS earth_radius_val FROM geospatial_data WHERE isIRI(description) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, description FROM geospatial_data WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND isIRI(description) = TRUE;
SELECT DISTINCT id, earth_radius() OVER(PARTITION BY description) AS radius FROM geospatial_data;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY earth_radius()) AS count_per_radius FROM geospatial_data WHERE isIRI(description) IS NULL;
SELECT id, earth_radius(), ST_AsText(location) AS loc_text FROM geospatial_data WHERE isIRI(ST_AsText(location)) OR description IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE edge_cases (num_value FLOAT, text_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT ISIRI(earth_radius()::text) AS is_radius_iri FROM edge_cases WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL OR text_value = '';
SELECT id FROM geospatial_data WHERE ST_Distance(location, ST_Point(0, 0)) < earth_radius() AND isIRI(description);
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT AVG(num_value) FROM edge_cases WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL), earth_radius()) AS average_value;
